name: oracle-cloud-ampere-a1
description: Oracle Cloud Ampere A1 auto-provisioning system (monorepo root)

scripts.dev:server: mkdir -p data/keys && uv --project apps/server run --env-file .env alembic -c apps/server/alembic.ini upgrade head && uv --project apps/server run --env-file .env uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir apps/server/src --reload --port 8000
